realTimeTraces.title: Real-Time Traces
realTimeTraces.description: Every request logged with full input, output, cost, and latency. Query millions of traces instantly.

costTracking.title: Cost Tracking
costTracking.description: Automatic per-token pricing for 70+ models. See exactly where your money goes.

smartRouting.title: Smart Routing
smartRouting.description: Route simple prompts to cheap models, complex ones to powerful ones. Automatic fallbacks.

qualityMonitoring.title: Quality Monitoring
qualityMonitoring.description: AI agents scan traces for hallucinations and quality drops. Get alerts before users notice.

modelDistillation.title: Model Distillation
modelDistillation.description: Train smaller, faster, cheaper models from your production data. Own your models.

openaiCompatible.title: OpenAI-compatible
openaiCompatible.description: Same format you already use. Change one line to start.

automaticFallbacks.title: Automatic fallbacks
automaticFallbacks.description: If a provider goes down, OpenTracy switches to your backup.

costOnResponse.title: Cost on every response
costOnResponse.description: Every response includes exact cost. No more guessing.

fullStreaming.title: Full streaming

free.name: Free
free.description: For developers exploring LLM routing and observability.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For teams running LLMs in production.

enterprise.name: Enterprise

pricing.billingNote: All prices in USD. Billed monthly or annually (save 20%).

faqs.question: What counts as a request?
faqs.answer: Each API call through OpenTracy counts as one request. Both successful and failed calls are counted.

faqs.question: Can I self-host OpenTracy?
faqs.answer: Yes. OpenTracy is open source (MIT). You can self-host the full stack with Docker. Starter and Enterprise plans add managed features on top.

faqs.question: Which providers are supported?
faqs.answer: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Mistral, Groq, AWS Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Cohere, DeepSeek, Together AI, Fireworks, Ollama, and OpenRouter.

faqs.question: How does the free trial work?
faqs.answer: 14 days of Starter features, no credit card required. After the trial, you move to the Free plan automatically.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant. Enterprise plans include VPC deployment and BYOK encryption.

faqs.question: Can I switch plans anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.

items.quote: OpenTracy let us consolidate 4 different LLM integrations into a single API. Our team ships features 3x faster now.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: The cost tracking alone saved us $2,400/month. We had no idea how much we were overspending on GPT-4 calls.
items.name: Marcus Rivera

items.quote: Switched from a custom routing layer to OpenTracy in one afternoon. The fallback system caught two provider outages in the first week.
items.name: Anja Kowalski
